query:
-- Check if customers already exist
SELECT externalId, name FROM customers WHERE externalId IN ('C9027', 'C9028');

-- Update RVC-STUB-001 (Flutterbys Childcare - already matched, just fix address)
UPDATE services SET locationAddress='234 Albany Creek Rd, BRIDGEMAN DOWNS QLD 4035',
  technology='FTTP', speedTier='100Mbps/40Mbps', ipAddress='211.27.129.138', serviceActivationDate='2021-04-22'
WHERE externalId='RVC-STUB-001';

-- Update RVC-STUB-002 (W&T Parcel & Freight)
UPDATE services SET customerExternalId='C0283', customerName='W&T Parcel & Freight',
  locationAddress='Shed 7, 17 Kingston Dr, MARYBOROUGH WEST QLD 4650',
  technology='WLS', speedTier='150Mbps/30Mbps', ipAddress='125.168.90.21', serviceActivationDate='2021-07-19'

-- Update RVC-STUB-013 (Southside Specialist Medical)

-- Verify all 16 are now matched
SELECT externalId, customerExternalId, customerName, technology, speedTier, ipAddress
FROM services WHERE externalId LIKE 'RVC-STUB-%' ORDER BY externalId;
